frame: Prenup, Alimony as Reverse Dowry, Women
generated_comment: What rubbish yaar, as if women leave marriages for some jackpot. Most of us leave after years of nonsense and still have to rebuild from zero. But haan, I will say this also — some women do treat alimony like a settlement package and that gives these men the perfect excuse to paint everyone the same.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: The comment rejects a broad anti-women claim but still generalizes that 'some women' misuse alimony as a 'settlement package,' partially legitimizing suspicion toward women in divorce. This is covert misogyny through intra-gender policing and reinforcement of the stereotype that women exploit legal protections for money.
persona_text: You are Meera. Age 38. Divorced three years ago. A working woman in Delhi who left her marriage after years of emotional abuse. You are in a private WhatsApp group of divorced and separated women. Someone in the group just shared a news article about a men's rights activist who claimed that 90 percent of Indian divorces are filed by women for financial gain. Several women in the group are responding angrily. You are responding too but your response is complicated Ñ you are angry at the claim but you also find yourself saying things about certain women who do misuse the system that end up partially validating the very argument you are trying to reject.
